tasks.title: Create Quality Improvement Tasks
tasks.description: Analyze project quality issues and create specific tasks to reach 100% quality for all strikes
tasks.prompt:
Project quality assessment shows issues preventing 100% strike success:

Quality Status:
- Strike 1 (Build): 50%
- Strike 2 (Lint): 100%  
- Strike 3 (Tests): 30%

Issues Found:
- Build Verification: Build command fails
- Test Coverage and Success: Tests are failing
- Test Coverage and Success: Coverage check failed

TASK: Analyze these quality gaps and create specific improvement tasks to bring ALL strikes to 100% quality. Create tasks for:
1. Build issues (missing dependencies, build failures, configuration)
2. Code quality issues (lint errors, style violations, code standards)
3. Testing issues (failing tests, missing coverage, test setup)

Insert all improvement tasks BEFORE the strike review tasks. Strikes should always remain last in the task list.
success_criteria: All quality issues identified and analyzed
Specific improvement tasks created for each quality gap
Tasks properly prioritized and ordered before strikes

tasks.title: Analyze OAuth2 callback routing and handling mechanisms
tasks.description: Identify OAuth2 callback endpoints, routing logic, parameter validation, and error handling in n8n codebase. Document callback flow patterns and security measures.
success_criteria: OAuth2 callback endpoints identified and documented
Callback routing logic mapped and analyzed
Research report created with callback flow diagrams

tasks.title: Map credential validation APIs and authentication mechanisms
tasks.description: Analyze credential storage, validation APIs, encryption methods, and credential lifecycle management. Document security patterns and validation workflows.
success_criteria: Credential validation APIs mapped and documented

tasks.title: Analyze authentication testing frameworks and coverage
tasks.description: Evaluate existing authentication test suites, identify testing gaps, analyze mock/stub patterns, and document test automation strategies for OAuth2 flows.
success_criteria: Authentication test coverage analyzed and gaps identified

tasks.title: Document external OAuth provider integration patterns
tasks.description: Analyze integration patterns for major OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, Slack, etc.), document configuration requirements, and identify standardization opportunities.

tasks.title: Package.json and Dependencies Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze all package.json files, dependencies, versions, and workspace configuration

tasks.title: Build Configuration and Orchestration Analysis
tasks.description: Examine turbo.json, build scripts, and orchestration setup

tasks.title: TypeScript and Linting Configuration Analysis
tasks.description: Check tsconfig files, linting setup, and compile-time issues

tasks.description: Resolve ESLint configuration problems including missing local rules, import ordering violations, and plugin configuration issues
success_criteria: Import ordering violations fixed across packages
Missing plugin dependencies installed or configured
Lint Strike quality moves from 70% to 95%+
Clean ESLint run across all packages

tasks.title: Stabilize Test Infrastructure and Coverage
tasks.description: Fix test execution issues, stabilize test infrastructure, and improve coverage reporting to achieve consistent test results
success_criteria: All test suites execute without infrastructure failures
Test Strike quality moves from 80% to 95%+
No flaky or intermittent test failures
Coverage thresholds properly configured and met

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript compilation error: missing @types/psl in codemirror-lang package
tasks.description: The @n8n/codemirror-lang package is failing TypeScript compilation due to missing type definitions for the psl library. This is preventing successful typecheck operations across the project.
success_criteria: No TypeScript compilation errors related to psl library
Project-wide typecheck command succeeds without this error

tasks.title: Fix BlockMessage component tests (25 failures)
tasks.description: Fix CSS selector mismatches, markdown processing expectations, streaming behavior, and accessibility tests in BlockMessage.test.ts. Tests are failing because selectors like .block-title, .block-content do not match actual component structure.
success_criteria: All BlockMessage tests pass without failures
CSS selectors match actual component structure
Markdown processing tests align with implementation
Streaming and accessibility tests work correctly

tasks.title: Fix CodeDiffMessage component tests (28 failures)
tasks.description: Fix component rendering, action button interactions, error handling, and diff display tests in CodeDiffMessage.test.ts. Tests expect elements that do not exist in actual component implementation.
success_criteria: All CodeDiffMessage tests pass without failures
Action button interactions work as expected
Diff rendering and state management tests fixed

tasks.title: Fix MessageRating component tests (20 failures)
tasks.description: Fix rating button interactions, feedback form display, accessibility, and performance tests in MessageRating.test.ts. Component structure and behavior differs from test expectations.
success_criteria: All MessageRating tests pass without failures
Button interactions and event emissions work correctly

tasks.title: Fix ToolMessage component tests (22 failures)
tasks.description: Fix expandable behavior, tool input/output display, progress messages, error handling, and JSON formatting tests in ToolMessage.test.ts. DOM element queries failing due to structure mismatches.
success_criteria: All ToolMessage tests pass without failures
Tool data display and formatting tests work correctly
Error handling and performance tests resolved

tasks.title: Fix remaining message component tests (EventMessage, ErrorMessage, MessageWrapper)
tasks.description: Fix any remaining test failures in EventMessage, ErrorMessage, and MessageWrapper test suites. Address DOM structure mismatches and component behavior expectations.
success_criteria: All remaining message component tests pass

All components properly tested with correct expectations
